creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
(In reply to paradox@atomicrhino.net from comment #0)

Hi,

This update has been committed to the portstree.
New packages are not build yet, so please give it a couple of days for the build cluster to create them.
When they are built, they will be in the /latest pkg repo.

Instructions on how to switch tot the /latest repo can be found here:
https://wiki.servarr.com/prowlarr/installation#prowlarr-installation

Let me know if you run into any problem.
